notes: B21 libbitcoin integration/performance evidence ledger. This is an evidence and overclaim gate, not a substitute for owner-run full-chain benchmarks.

surfaces.surface: C++ libbitcoin integration example uses the default UFSECP_LBTC_AUTO controller model
surfaces.claim_scope: Integration hygiene: libbitcoin call sites can use ufsecp::lbtc::Controller without spelling UFSECP_LBTC_AUTO.

surfaces.surface: libbitcoin batch benchmark emits a structured JSON artifact
surfaces.claim_scope: Benchmark evidence format: local throughput numbers must be recorded with target_context, claim_scope, backend, device, batch, iters, pool, and timing.

surfaces.surface: CUDA libbitcoin opaque ECDSA row path reuses grow-only device buffers across batches
surfaces.claim_scope: Implementation optimization: removes per-batch cudaMalloc/cudaFree from the consensus-bearing libbitcoin row path while preserving direct opaque-row parsing on device.

surfaces.surface: MSVC Windows libbitcoin profile remains a first-class measured target
surfaces.claim_scope: Owner-measured Windows/MSVC profile: current MSVC path is accelerated relative to the previous MSVC build on the owner's Windows machine; exact hardware artifact remains owner-side until a public JSON bench artifact is attached.
surfaces.reproduce_command: cmake -S . -B out/libbitcoin-msvc -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DSECP256K1_BUILD_LIBBITCOIN=ON -DSECP256K1_BUILD_CABI=ON -DSECP256K1_BUILD_LIBBITCOIN_BENCH=ON && cmake --build out/libbitcoin-msvc -j && out\\libbitcoin-msvc\\include\\ufsecp\\bench_lbtc_batch.exe 1000000 5 50000 --json out\\libbitcoin-msvc\\lbtc_msvc.json

surfaces.surface: Vertical/column API accepts libbitcoin opaque ECDSA signatures while documenting the current scratch-normalization boundary
surfaces.claim_scope: Interface contract: columns keep the opaque signature format by default; row API is current no-intermediate-table GPU path, while columns remain explicitly tracked so no native no-copy GPU-column claim can be made accidentally.

surfaces.surface: CAAS gate validates libbitcoin performance/integration evidence before claims are trusted
surfaces.claim_scope: Audit discipline: libbitcoin performance evidence must name target_context, claim_scope, reproduce command, evidence paths, and copy/native-hardware policy.
